title: 朝日杯FSの後に・燃ゆる炎

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't let anyone else take this race. I'm going to
win it for myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen won this race before... and now it's my
turn to do the same!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What confidence in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I can defeat someone with bright eyes like her...
If I manage to obtain enough courage to
overcome her spirit...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am getting goosebumps just thinking of it. My
legs itch for the track—the blood in my veins cries
for more!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Grampa, I promise you, I will best her and show
you how much I have grown!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I wanted to ask what race I'm aiming
for next...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the first race of the Classic Triple Crown
tour, and one that you can only compete in once
in your life, just like the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is one of those moments... "The gates wait
for no one!" Hngh... I'm so excited, I feel like I
could burst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We start training right away the next day, with
Sakura Chiyono O still bouncing off the walls with
energy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Was that everything we had planned for training today?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's that running over there?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can't believe she's still training. She must
be gearing up for the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Can I run another lap?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to work just as hard as she is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Sakura Chiyono O starts running again.
She looks energized and exuberant as her feet
kick off the ground with each stride.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You hold so much potential in your hands. So
much that you may even grasp the things I
couldn't.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You know, Maruzen, you can run if you want to.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to force yourself to hold back and
simply watch from the sidelines. There's no need
to make yourself grow up faster.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it a little too early to hand over the dreams
you've been carrying to someone else, Hot Rod?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to give them just anyone. It's going
to be her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Everything I have, everything I am... it's all going
to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two Umamusume glance down at the
hardworking Sakura Chiyono O, who remains
oblivious to their conversation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead, her sights are fixed upon her next
goal—the Satsuki Sho.
